articles.title: Ether EFT Gets Approval From Brazilian Securities Regulator
articles.description: The Brazilian Securities Regulator, Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM) gives approval for an Ether exchange-traded fund (ETF). The holding company of QR Asset Management, QR Capital, announced the approval. 🔴 BREAKING: CVM aprova o 1º ETF de Ethereum da América Latina, o QETH11. O ETF da QR Asset Management, gestora do grupo QR Capital, será listado na B3, que se torna a 1ª bolsa na América...

Bitcoin Miners Have Started Selling, Bear Market Ahead?
articles.description: Bitcoin on-chain data has revealed that miners have started selling more BTC on exchanges, an indicator that a bear market could be ahead. Miners To Exchanges Flow Has Sharply Risen As pointed out by a CryptoQuant post, the all miners to all exchanges flow mean for Bitcoin seems to have sharply risen this past weekend. articles.description: Binance has now burned over $300 million worth of crypto coins in its quarterly burns. articles.title: DeFi lending platform Aave to ‘build Twitter on Ethereum’
articles.description: Decentralized lending platform Aave will build “Twitter on Ethereum,” its founder, Stani Kulechov, tweeted during the weekend. His message came seemingly in response to an announcement that Twitter founder Jack Dorsey was developing a Bitcoin-oriented fintech platform resembling Aave.
